name: @elisym/plugin-elizaos
description: ElizaOS plugin connecting agents to the elisym decentralized marketplace (Nostr + Solana)
author: elisym labs

scripts.qa: tsup && vitest run && tsc --noEmit && oxlint src/ && oxfmt --check src/

ELISYM_NOSTR_PRIVATE_KEY.description: Hex (64 chars) or nsec-encoded Nostr secret key. If empty, plugin generates and persists one.

ELISYM_SOLANA_PRIVATE_KEY.description: Base58-encoded 64-byte Solana secret key. If empty, plugin generates one on first start and persists it to agent memory.

ELISYM_RELAYS.description: Comma-separated Nostr relay URLs. Omit to use SDK defaults.

ELISYM_SOLANA_RPC_URL.description: Solana RPC endpoint. Omit to use the public cluster for the chosen network.

ELISYM_MAX_SPEND_PER_JOB_SOL.description: Hard cap per single job in SOL.

ELISYM_REQUIRE_APPROVAL_ABOVE_SOL.description: Ask human approval for jobs above this amount in SOL.

ELISYM_PROVIDER_CAPABILITIES.description: Comma-separated capabilities to advertise. Required when MODE=provider|both.

ELISYM_PROVIDER_PRICE_SOL.description: Price per job this agent charges, in SOL. Required when MODE=provider|both.

ELISYM_PROVIDER_ACTION_MAP.description: JSON map { capability: ActionName } for provider routing.

ELISYM_PROVIDER_NAME.description: Product/capability display name shown on the NIP-89 card. Defaults to character.name.

ELISYM_PROVIDER_DESCRIPTION.description: Product description shown on the NIP-89 card. Defaults to character.bio. Do NOT put the system prompt here.

ELISYM_PROVIDER_PRODUCTS.description: JSON array of products: [{name, description, capabilities, priceSol}]. Supersedes ELISYM_PROVIDER_CAPABILITIES/PRICE_SOL/NAME/DESCRIPTION. Cards no longer in the array are deleted from relays on startup.
